author.name: Sarah Hatch
author.instructions: Fill out all relevant fields in this document. If you are not using a field (i.e., you don't have any code blocks) then fully delete that field. Within the 'projects' array below, include 1 entry for each of your experiments. You can copy and past for additional projects.

projects.project_title: Writeup Using Blueprints to modify VFX
projects.description: Discussion of how Blueprints can modify and interact with Niagara systems and dynamic material instances.
Niagara magic circles that activate when the player enters and change the weather. Niagara snowfall and rainfall emitters.
A simple forcefield effect that react to collision events. Additionally a discussion of better ways to handle projectile collisions.
